title: Help Integrating Absentify Calendar into Monday.com

posts.author: emmaunicorn (Emma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We’re currently using Absentify to track team holidays and events, and we’d love to integrate it with monday so our team can easily see who’s off and when - ideally in a calendar view or dashboard.

Has anyone successfully done this, or have any tips on how to sync the Absentify calendar with Monday? Even just being able to display it within a dashboard would be really helpful.

Appreciate any advice, tools, or workarounds you’ve used!

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking at make.com and zapier, I don’t see Absentify listed. Not saying it can’t be done, but it might not be a simple integration.

Have you looked at ‘recreating’ the attendance tracker in monday?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
